## Summary

Describe the change and the agent/user workflow it improves.

## Safety

- [ ] This keeps the project explicitly unofficial.
- [ ] This does not use private/internal Withings APIs.
- [ ] This does not expose OAuth tokens, client secrets or activity, GPS or health data.
- [ ] This preserves read-only behavior unless the change is explicitly about disconnect/revoke.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke`
- [ ] Relevant docs updated
